placeholders.name: TEMPLATE_ROOT
placeholders.description: Absolute path to the unpacked flow-ts template source during development.

placeholders.name: INSTALL_ROOT
placeholders.description: Absolute path to the installed nuwax-flow-ts agent package.

placeholders.name: WORKSPACE_ROOT
placeholders.description: Absolute path to the user's active workspace.

placeholders.name: LOG_DIR
placeholders.description: Directory for runtime logs (defaults to the package logs/ dir).

placeholders.name: OPENAI_MODEL
placeholders.description: OpenAI-compatible chat model name (method A; 国内默认 DeepSeek，可换通义/智谱/Kimi/小米 mimo).

placeholders.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
placeholders.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (method A); 国内默认 DeepSeek 端点.

placeholders.name: ANTHROPIC_MODEL
placeholders.description: Anthropic-protocol model name (method B; default provider).

placeholders.name: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL
placeholders.description: Anthropic-protocol / self-hosted proxy base URL (method B).

placeholders.name: ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN
placeholders.description: Anthropic bearer auth token (alternative to the API key, method B).

placeholders.name: MAX_TOKENS
placeholders.description: Maximum model output tokens (overrides config model.settings.maxTokens).

placeholders.name: DEEPAGENTS_DEFAULT_MCP
placeholders.description: Set to "disabled" (or "off"/"none", case-insensitive) to skip default MCP server loading; ACP session mcpServers are unaffected.

placeholders.name: MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT_MS
placeholders.description: MCP tool invocation timeout in milliseconds.

placeholders.name: PACKAGE_VERSION
placeholders.description: Version stamped into generated install metadata.
